commit.subject: LU-18847 tests: duplicated names in migrating dir
commit.message:
LU-18847 tests: duplicated names in migrating dir

An attempt to create duplicated file names in
two different stripes of a "migrating" dir.

HP-bug-id: LUS-12792
Test-parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity mdscount=2 env="ONLY=230A"
Signed-off-by: Alexander Zarochentsev <alexander.zarochentsev@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I96a51354a034878e283569fb3e90edbb2659ff06
